title: Moderation Update — 2026-04-29 Abuse Queue Triage
body:
Summary of moderation actions taken from today's abuse queue review:

BANNED (2):
- spam_wave_42 — Posted phishing links across 6 channels in 20 minutes. Immediate ban for spam/phishing.
- toxic_runner — Repeated targeted harassment against newcomers. Ban for harassment.

WARNED (2):
- new_member_17 — Off-topic post in #introductions. Issued a friendly reminder about channel guidelines.
- bot_like_user_77 — Suspicious automation: repeated near-identical replies in help channels. Warned and asked to confirm human status.

DISMISSED (2):
- trusted_helper (report_003) — Dispute during a moderation disagreement. Trusted member; no action taken.
- core_maintainer (report_006) — False positive from brigading users after a moderation decision. Trusted member; no action taken.

All 6 reports have been reviewed and closed. If you believe any action was taken in error, please open a new report or contact the moderation team.
